texto: Nothing to say. I used to be a ghostwriter for a publisher.’‘Medieval stuff?’‘Eighty-page love stories. You have this guy, untrustworthy but good in bed, and this girl, radiant but innocent. In the end they fall madly in love and it’s incredibly boring. The story doesn’t say when they split up.’‘Of course not,’ said Mathias

I used to be a ghostwriter for a publisher.’‘Medieval stuff?’‘Eighty-page love st…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre amor, romance, romance-novels, com foco em termino e romance-novels.
